description.hi: R2.8 अरब डरबन हार्बर ब्रिज विस्तार के लिए फास्टनर खरीद का वास्तविक केस स्टडी। कीमत, आपूर्तिकर्ता, विशिष्टताएं और डिलीवरी टाइमलाइन शामिल।

keywords: South Africa fastener market, Durban construction, IBR roofing screws, hex bolts South Africa, fastener supplier Durban, construction hardware import, SABS certified fasteners

heading.en: Project Overview: R2.8 Billion Durban Harbour Bridge Expansion
heading.zh: 项目概况：28亿兰特德班港大桥扩建
heading.es: Descripción del Proyecto: Expansión del Puente del Puerto de Durban por R2.8 Mil Millones
heading.fr: Aperçu du Projet: Expansion du Pont du Port de Durban à 2,8 Milliards de Rands
heading.pt: Visão Geral do Projeto: Expansão da Ponte do Porto de Durban de R$ 2,8 Bilhões
heading.ar: نظرة عامة على المشروع: توسعة جسر ميناء ديربان بقيمة 2.8 مليار راند
heading.ru: Обзор проекта: Расширение моста порта Дурбан на 2,8 млрд рэндов
heading.ja: プロジェクト概要：28億ランドのダーバン港橋 расширения
heading.de: Projektübersicht: R2,8 Milliarden Durban Hafengebrücke Erweiterung
heading.hi: प्रोजेक्ट ओवरव्यू: R2.8 अरब डरबन हार्बर ब्रिज विस्तार

body.en:
The Durban Harbour Bridge expansion represents South Africa's largest infrastructure project in 2024-2026, requiring 847 tonnes of structural fasteners across 36 contract phases. The project specified Grade 8.8 hex bolt (See our Hex Bolt Dimensions Chart for specifications and sizing.)s for primary structural connections and Grade 4.6 bolts for secondary applications.

Key fastener specifications for this project included:

  • Hex bolts M20x80mm Grade 8.8: 124,000 pieces for main girder connections
  • Hex bolts M16x60mm Grade 8.8: 89,000 pieces for cross-beam assemblies
  • Self-drilling TEK screw (See our Self-Drilling Screws Selection Guide for specifications and sizing.)s 12g x 25mm: 450,000 pieces for steel decking
  • Anchor bolts M24x300mm: 18,000 pieces for foundation work
body.zh: 德班港大桥扩建项目是2024-2026年南非最大的基础设施项目，在36个合同阶段需要847吨结构紧固件。该项目指定8.8级六角螺栓用于主要结构连接，4.6级螺栓用于辅助应用。

heading.en: Supplier Selection: Why China Sourced Fasteners Won the Contract
heading.zh: 供应商选择：为何中国采购紧固件赢得合同
heading.es: Selección de Proveedores: Por qué los Sujetadores de Origen Chino Ganaron el Contrato
heading.fr: Sélection des Fournisseurs: Pourquoi les Fixations d'Origine Chinoise Ont Gagné le Contrat
heading.pt: Seleção de Fornecedores: Por Que os Fixadores de Origem Chinesa Venceram o Contrato
heading.ar: اختيار الموردين: لماذا فازت مثبتات المنشأ الصيني بالعقد
heading.ru: Выбор поставщика: почему китайские крепежные изделия выиграли контракт
heading.ja: サプライヤー選定：中国起源の締結具が契約を獲得した理由
heading.de: Lieferantenauswahl: Warum Chinesische Beschaffte Befestigungsmittel Den Vertrag Gewannen
heading.hi: सप्लायर चयन: चीन से सोर्स किए गए फास्टनर ने क्यों जीता अनुबंध

body.en:
Three supplier options were evaluated: local South African distributor, European manufacturer, and Chinese manufacturer. The evaluation criteria included price, lead time, SABS certification, and technical support capability.

Cost Comparison (per tonne, CIF Durban):

  • South African local: ZAR 89,000/tonne (€4,450/tonne)
  • European manufacturer: €6,200/tonne
  • Chinese manufacturer (TradeGo): €3,850/tonne

Chinese fasteners delivered 47% cost savings versus local South African supply, with identical SABS certification documentation. The only concern was ocean freight reliability—resolved by booking with Mediterranean Shipping Company (MSC) on 12-week contracts.

heading.en: Import Regulations and Compliance for South Africa
heading.zh: 南非进口法规和合规性
heading.es: Regulaciones de Importación y Cumplimiento para Sudáfrica
heading.fr: Réglementations d'Importation et Conformité pour l'Afrique du Sud
heading.pt: Regulamentos de Importação e Conformidade para a África do Sul
heading.ru: Правила импорта и соответствия для ЮАР
heading.ja: 南アフリカの輸入規制とコンプライアンス
heading.hi: दक्षिण अफ्रीका के लिए आयात नियम और अनुपालन

body.en:
All fasteners imported to South Africa must comply with SABS certification requirements under the Trade Metrology Act. Key compliance points:

  • SABS mark required: All structural fasteners must carry SABS certification mark
  • ISO 9001 certificate: Manufacturer must provide ISO 9001:2015 certification
  • Bill of Materials (BOM): Detailed specifications in millimeters and ISO standards required
  • Port of entry: Durban Port (largest in sub-Saharan Africa) handles 65% of South Africa's container traffic

Typical clearance time at Durban Port: 5-7 working days with proper documentation. TradeGo provides pre-shipment SABS documentation package including tensile test reports and coating thickness certificates.

heading.zh: 项目成果：实现18%成本降低
heading.es: Resultados del Proyecto: 18% de Reducción de Costos Lograda
heading.fr: Résultats du Projet: 18% de Réduction des Coûts Atteinte
heading.pt: Resultados do Projeto: 18% de Redução de Custos Alcançada
heading.ar: نتائج المشروع: تحقيق تخفيض التكاليف بنسبة 18٪
heading.ru: Результаты проекта: Достигнуто снижение затрат на 18%
heading.ja: プロジェクト成果：18%のコスト削減を達成
heading.hi: परियोजना परिणाम: 18% लागत में कमी हासिल

body.en:
Final Project Metrics:

  • Total fastener cost: $236,370 (vs. $288,000 budgeted with local supplier)
  • Savings achieved: $51,630 = 18% reduction
  • Delivery performance: 100% on-time across all 36 contract phases
  • Quality incidents: Zero non-conformance reports
  • SABS certification: 100% first-time acceptance

The success of this project led to two additional South African infrastructure contracts in 2025, both using the same China-to-Durban procurement model.
